text: Good morning! Can you pull up today's calendar and reminders?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Friday, January 31. You have a 1:1 with Anika at 2 PM, and Lily needs to be picked up from daycare.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Hey Jarvis, I'm reviewing the billing integration specs for Vertex Health. The database query on the patient onboarding schema is running very slow. I want to make sure the team doesn't burn out.
title: Work Update

text: Good focus area. I recommend analyzing the query execution plan to see if a compound index can speed up patient onboarding. I can compile the competitor metrics if needed.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Wrote a custom vector memory index tool. Curiosity and Perseverance RTG decay rates differ. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: That is a clean implementation. MMRTG heat management is complex. I've archived your propulsion notes. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Analyzing the system logs from yesterday's release. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has secure messaging. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. Understood. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping secure messaging in the MVP. I'll keep tracking the API performance.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Planning for future education costs. Sarah and I are looking to maximize our savings rate. Financial planning is key for the kids.
title: Finance Update

text: Smart financial planning. Smart move. I've summarized recent expenses so you can find cuts. Ready to calculate more rates.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick log: Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Toddlers are full of energy. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Reviewing my sleep tracker logs. I hit 18 miles of running this week. Hope the allergies calm down.
title: Health Update

text: Sure thing! Staying active is key. Great progress! The consistent stretching is keeping you stable. I'll monitor the sleep metrics tonight.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan came home from Liberty Elementary in a great mood. He is asking lots of questions about exoplanet atmospheric compositions. He is really putting in the effort.
title: Kids School Update

text: Got it, Mike. Great update. That's a great interest. I can summarize the atmosphere of Venus in a kid-friendly way. I've logged this academic update.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. I am negotiating my senior PM salary and signing the Vertex Health offer letter. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. Good focus area. Negotiation is key. Ensure the relocation package covers the Chicago to Frisco move. Would you like me to draft a summary for Greg?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Soldering custom sensors in the garage. Spectrometry data for K2-18b is fascinating. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Space science and tech is a great focus. K2-18b atmospheric profiles are a milestone. I'll fetch companion papers. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that analyzing the system logs from yesterday's release. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has billing integration. I want to discuss this with you before the sync.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. I checked the recent logs for that. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping billing integration in the MVP. Should we schedule a calendar slot to do a deep dive?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Updating our financial spreadsheets. Sarah and I are looking to maximize our savings rate. Glad we are staying on top of this.
title: Finance Update

text: Smart financial planning. Smart move. I've summarized recent expenses so you can find cuts. Ready to calculate more rates.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Just wanted to mention that lily refused to eat her dinner today. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: That sounds like a sweet moment. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Took Lily to her medical checkup. Ethan's grass allergies are acting up again. Need to focus on recovery.
title: Health Update

text: Sure thing! I've logged your vitals. I've set a calendar slot for the clinic and added meds refills. The refilling reminder is active.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Sarah attended the parent-teacher conference today. He is stuck on a math word problem involving division. I'm proud of his curiosity.
title: Kids School Update

text: Interesting. Great update. Try using visual diagrams to explain remainders. He'll get it quickly. I've logged this academic update.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick journal entry for tonight. Busy day at Vertex Health. Dealt with bedtime tantrums but made it through. Logged my running mileage and stretched my knee. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Logged that for you. See you in the morning, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
